name: staged-review
description: Universal review chain inside the six-phase development lifecycle (task-driver(1) → worktree(2) → bots(3) → commit-review(4) → merge(5) → audit-review(6)). Three sibling skills — code-review (pre-commit triage, single-reviewer), commit-review (pre-merge correctness gate, single-reviewer), audit-review (post-merge full 5+1 with mandatory Codex). v1.19.4: all three skill bodies aligned to the rmap-first roadmap posture — ceremony-floor "ROADMAP candidate" findings file via `rmap new --from-stdin`; audit-review's doc-update step runs `rmap status` / `rmap render` instead of hand-editing ROADMAP.md. Doc-reference-only, no behavior change. v1.19.3: commit-review + audit-review skill bodies repointed from the now-split `linear-workflow` include to `linear-queue` / `agent-dispatch` / `agent-pr-review`; stale `§` section anchors fixed (commit-review carried ~17 — `Codex-Reviews-Cursor Pattern`, `Linear GH Auto-Transitions`, `Default flow is review-only`, etc.). Doc-reference-only, no behavior change. v1.19.2: audit-review Codex-dispatch model corrected (Steps 5b, 5c, 10) — replaces the v1.19.1 `--wait` instruction (not a valid flag for `task`) with deliberate `--background` + direct-Bash polling of `codex-companion status/result` (slash commands are user-only). Codex investigations regularly take 5-30+ min; foreground would hit the Bash 10-min cap mid-investigation and silently degrade to single-reviewer. Background dispatch uses the codex plugin's persistent broker (jobs survive across Claude turns and sessions); stall after 30 min checkpoints to `.audit/_in_progress_<range>.md` and stops the audit instead of dropping the Codex finding. New Step 5c documents resume-from-checkpoint. Rationale: Codex catches bugs Claude misses; losing those to wall-time bounds is unacceptable. v1.19: Phase Awareness headers on all three skills (predecessor/successor + Linear status entry/exit); commit-review Linear-optional (mode-split at Step 1: Linear-aware OR gh-only — no abort, self-authored worktree PRs and Linear-free projects both supported); commit-review auto-merge widened from cloud-agent-branches-only to all feature-branch PRs (worktree branches qualify too, gated on the 5 preconditions); audit-review trigger relocated post-merge (was post-pr-create) so bot findings are integrated and the audit commit lands durably on the default branch. v1.18: code-review RELAXED — removed mandatory parallel Codex dispatch from pre-commit; dual-reviewer pass now exclusively in audit-review. v1.17: audit-status command + unaudited-commits SessionStart hook. v1.16: audit-review skill + commit-review simplification with auto-merge.
